title: GOOD: Defensive key copy in lichen_l2_input prevents use-after-free on refactor
description: lichen_l2.c lines 471-481: RX path copies link_key into a local buffer rather than taking a pointer to link_ctx.link_key. Currently safe because cleanup holds rx_mutex, but the copy eliminates a subtle lifetime dependency that would cause UAF if cleanup moved outside the mutex. 16-byte copy is cheap insurance. Worth defending.
